---
title: "Quiz Variants"
id: "mod001-se01-sec06-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec06"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this mcq._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="mcq"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the mcq format here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this short answer._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="short_answer"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the short_answer format here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Callout Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec06-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Reflection Variants</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
